description: Controlled-dataset diagnostic matrix for paraphrase equivalence, parser transparency, candidate ownership, and unsupported behavior. This file is an evaluation oracle only; PDF evidence remains the application truth boundary.

families.description: Equivalent ways to request candidates with all three backend technologies.

questions.question: Which candidates have experience with Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL?
Who knows Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL?
Find people skilled in Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.
Show candidates with a background in Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.

families.description: Bachelor of Science aliases must preserve the degree-level and field relation.

questions.question: Who has a Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering?
Who holds a BSc in Software Engineering?
Which candidates earned a BS in Software Engineering?
Which CVs show a Bachelor of Science focused on Software Engineering?

families.description: Conversational relationship wording must not become separate hard evidence requirements.

questions.question: Who knows engineering?
Who is related to engineering?
Which candidates have an engineering background?
Find people who work in engineering.

families.description: Numeric duration paraphrases must preserve the professional-experience relation and comparison operator.

questions.question: Who has more than 5 years of working experience?
Who has over five years of professional experience?
Find candidates with at least 6 years of experience.
Which candidates have 6+ years in their career?

families.description: Backend role and native-language proficiency must remain attached to the same candidate.

questions.question: Find a backend engineer who speaks German natively.
Which backend engineer is a native German speaker?
Who works in backend engineering and has German as a native language?
Show a backend developer whose mother tongue is German.

families.description: Playwright evidence must be combined with the candidate's own QA profession.

questions.question: Which QA candidates have Playwright experience?
Find QA engineers who know Playwright.
Who works in QA automation and uses Playwright?
Compare the Playwright QA candidates.

families.description: Named-candidate comparison paraphrases must preserve both identities and the target role.

questions.question: Compare Aino Korhonen and Lukas Gruber for a cloud data engineering role.
How do Aino Korhonen and Lukas Gruber compare for cloud data engineering?
Evaluate Aino Korhonen versus Lukas Gruber for a cloud data engineer position.
Between Aino Korhonen and Lukas Gruber, who fits cloud data engineering?

families.description: Team-size wording and number forms must preserve the management relation.

questions.question: Which candidate managed a team of exactly 8 engineers?
Who led a team of eight engineers?
Find someone who managed an eight-person engineering team.
Which candidate supervised a team of 8 people?

families.description: Accessibility evidence must be attached to frontend candidates rather than incidental collaborators.

questions.question: Which frontend candidates have accessibility experience?
Who knows accessibility in frontend development?
Find frontend engineers with accessible web experience.
Who has a frontend background related to accessibility?

families.description: Compound machine-learning requirements must be covered by the same candidate.

questions.question: Which candidate combines PyTorch, NLP, and vector-database experience?
Who knows PyTorch, NLP, and vector databases?
Find someone with a background in PyTorch NLP and vector search.
Which candidate has worked with PyTorch for NLP and semantic vector retrieval?

families.description: Native Spanish, Spark, and data-engineering role evidence must stay candidate-owned.

questions.question: Find a data engineer who speaks Spanish natively and has Spark experience.
Which Spark data engineer is a native Spanish speaker?
Who works in data engineering with Spark and has Spanish as a native language?
Show a data engineer using Spark whose mother tongue is Spanish.

families.description: Unsupported paraphrases must remain empty and must never trigger a hosted answer provider.

questions.question: Which candidates hold government security clearance?
Who has an active government security clearance?
Find candidates vetted for classified government work.
Which CV proves authorization to access classified information?
